privileged_info_summary: The task tests posting a forum announcement in the BIO101 (Introduction to Biology) course on a Moodle LMS. The course is created during environment setup with exact name BIO101 and full name 'Introduction to Biology'. The expected subject is 'Welcome to Introduction to Biology - Spring 2026'. The verification checks for presence of keywords: BIO101, cell biology, genetics, ecology, and syllabus in the posted announcement message. All test data is synthetically generated during environment initialization.
